race.comment: SHASFA (6) showed good early muster and fought on to finish third last start over 1000m at this track. Will take advantage of the good draw. Well placed and there is no reason she cannot salute third-up into the campaign. DEMETRIOUS (9) resumes. Wasn't far away at last run before a break, finishing seventh over 1000m at Ascot four months ago. Sure to make his presence felt back to a more suitable level today. POWER TO RULE (12) showed good early dash and raced on the speed last start before fading to finish 1.2 lengths back in fourth over 1200m at this track. One of the main contenders. MAGNASONIC (7) has been out of the winner's list for a long time, last start finishing eighth at this track over 1000m. Suitably placed so anticipating a better run this time. SANCTIONS (10) has trialled nicely in readiness for her return and is not to be discounted.
